overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a western-themed open world game showing a character in cowboy attire walking along a scenic river canyon. The character crosses a wooden rope bridge and continues along a dirt trail through a forested canyon with steep rock walls and flowing water.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky riverbank approach to wooden bridge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across rocky terrain toward a wooden rope bridge spanning the river

entered.detail: small stone building with wooden roof on the left side of the path
uneven stone ground with patches of grass
fast-flowing river with white water rapids
wooden suspension bridge with rope railings crossing the river ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks across rocky ground near a stone hut, approaching a wooden rope bridge over a rushing river. The canyon walls rise on both sides with sparse vegetation, and bright sunlight illuminates the scene.

events.description: character steps from rocky ground onto the wooden planks of the rope bridge

agents.ego_description: carefully walking across the wooden rope bridge, looking ahead toward the opposite bank

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks with thick rope handrails suspended over the river
thick twisted rope handrails on both sides of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wooden rope bridge, with the river rushing below and canyon cliffs visible in the distance. The bridge sways slightly as the character walks across the weathered planks toward the forested far bank.

events.description: character steps off the bridge onto a dirt trail along the forested riverbank

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt path through the trees, following the curve of the river

entered.detail: narrow dirt path winding through pine trees along the river
tall evergreen trees lining both sides of the trail

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the bridge, the character walks along a sun-dappled dirt trail through a pine forest. The river flows calmly to the right, bordered by steep canyon walls, while the path winds through moderate tree cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon passage with overhanging rocks

events.description: trail enters a shaded section beneath overhanging canyon walls, reducing direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: continuing along the narrowing trail beneath the shadow of overhanging cliffs

entered.detail: large rock overhang creating shade over the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail narrows as it enters a more enclosed canyon section, with a large overhanging cliff on the left casting shadows across the path. The river remains visible to the right, and the character walks through the dimmer, sheltered passage toward the canyon exit ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open canyon crossing into a sheltered, shadowed forest passage. It begins on rocky ground near a stone hut, moving toward a wooden rope bridge that spans a rushing river between towering canyon walls. As the character crosses the swaying weathered planks, the scene shifts from the open air of the bridge to a sun-dappled dirt trail winding through a pine forest. The path then leads deeper into the canyon, where the open sunlight gives way to the dimness of a large overhanging cliff that casts heavy shadows across the trail. Finally, the camera follows the character through this sheltered passage, keeping the river in view to the right while heading toward the canyon exit.
